name: eval datasets: each review-* subagent has evals/datasets/agents/<agent-name>.jsonl
command: for a in review-react-rsc review-react-a11y review-node-boundaries review-node-observability review-types review-compliance; do test -s "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/datasets/agents/$a.jsonl" || { echo "FAIL $a missing dataset" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
